doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: No such State Bar of California protocol exists, and California has not authorized paralegals to waive B&P §6125 unauthorized-practice rules in this manner.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: No such State Bar of California protocol exists; California has not authorized paralegals to practice law in this manner, and the cited waiver of B&P §6125 is implausible.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: No such State Bar of California protocol exists, and California has not authorized paralegals to waive B&P §6125 unauthorized-practice rules in this manner.
